name: SCP & CO Healthcare Acquisition Company
summary: SCP & CO Healthcare Acquisition Company does not have significant business. It focuses on effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to identify a prospective target business in the healthcare technology or healthcare-related industries in the United States and other developed countries. SCP & CO Healthcare Acquisition Company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Tampa, Florida.
